title: Upon Mistress Susanna Southwell, Her Cheeks.
content:
Rare are thy cheeks, Susanna, which do show
    Ripe cherries smiling, while that others blow.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Mistress Susanna Southwell, Her Cheeks.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
